It: Chapter Two (2019)

Theatrical Performance
Domestic Box Office $211,593,228Details
International Box Office $261,500,000
Worldwide Box Office $473,093,228
Domestic Physical Disc Sales
DVD Sales (estimated) $10,685,766
Blu-ray Sales (estimated) $16,612,619
Total $27,298,385
Further financial details...

Synopsis

Twenty-seven years after the Losers Club defeated Pennywise, he has returned to terrorize the town of Derry once more. Now adults, the Losers have long since gone their separate ways. However, people are disappearing again, so Mike, the only one of the group to remain in their hometown, calls the others home. Damaged by the experiences of their past, they must each conquer their deepest fears to destroy Pennywise once and for all…putting them directly in the path of the shape-shifting clown that has become deadlier than ever.

Metrics

Opening Weekend:$91,062,152 (43.0% of total gross)
Legs:2.32 (domestic box office/biggest weekend)
Domestic Share:44.7% (domestic box office/worldwide)
Production Budget:$70,000,000 (worldwide box office is 6.8 times production budget)
Theater counts:4,570 opening theaters/4,570 max. theaters, 5.6 weeks average run per theater
Infl. Adj. Dom. BO $276,272,376

Movie Details

Domestic Releases: September 6th, 2019 (Wide) by Warner Bros.
September 6th, 2019 (IMAX) by Warner Bros.
International Releases: September 4th, 2019 (Wide) (South Korea)
September 4th, 2019 (Wide), released as Tas: Antroji dalis (Lithuania)
September 5th, 2019 (Wide), released as Оно-2 (Russia (CIS))
September 5th, 2019 (Wide), released as It - Capitolo 2 (Italy)
September 5th, 2019 (Wide) (Germany)
Video Release: November 19th, 2019 by Warner Home Video
January 13th, 2020 by Warner Home Video
MPA Rating: R for disturbing violent content and bloody images throughout, pervasive language, and some crude sexual material.
(Rating bulletin 2588 (Cert #52302), 7/24/2019)
Running Time: 169 minutes
Franchise: It
Film format: IMAX: DMR
Geographical setting: Maine
Plot point: Child Murderer, Creature Feature, Hallucinations, Killer Clowns
Social setting: Supernatural
Subgenre: Supernatural Horror
Time period setting: 2010s
Source:Original Screenplay
Genre:Horror
Production Method:Live Action
Creative Type:Contemporary Fiction
Production/Financing Companies: New Line Cinema, Vertigo Entertainment, Rideback, Double Dream
Production Countries: United States
Languages: English

Synopsis

Twenty-seven years after the Losers Club defeated Pennywise, he has returned to terrorize the town of Derry once more. Now adults, the Losers have long since gone their separate ways. However, people are disappearing again, so Mike, the only one of the group to remain in their hometown, calls the others home. Damaged by the experiences of their past, they must each conquer their deepest fears to destroy Pennywise once and for all…putting them directly in the path of the shape-shifting clown that has become deadlier than ever.
